title: Kharg Island Is an Appealing Target for Trump, With High Risks
summary_full: A U.S. attack or a move to seize control of Iran’s main oil export hub could cripple the country’s ability to profit from its natural resources. But it would also risk sending energy prices even higher.
summary_public: A U.S. attack or a move to seize control of Iran’s main oil export hub could cripple the country’s ability to profit from its natural resources. But it would also risk sending energy prices even higher.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: attack or move to seize control of Iran’s oil hub
